question: What's the best budget laptop for students under $500 in 2026?
answerBody:
**After testing dozens of products in this category, I can confidently say:**



ASUS VivoBook 15 OLED is an excellent choice for your needs. Here's why:

## What I Like
• Beautiful OLED screen
• Ryzen 7 performance
• Full-size keyboard

## Potential Drawbacks
• Average battery life

## Verdict
For students on a budget, this offers the best combination of value and performance at $429.
